action.requirement: Must generate bars.json and chart.png via scripts before any analysis

forbidden_patterns.pattern: Sycophancy (hope this helps, professional analysis, soul, promise)

action.enforcement: Zero-Tolerance: Replace with Quantitative Delta, Boolean Slot, or 0-5 Quality Score

report.check: Include [SOT Scheduling], [Symmetry Score], and [0-5 Quality Audit]
Scenario-based: Bull Case / Bear Case / Wait Condition
Strict format: [Quality Check]: Body(X) + Close(Y) + Size(Z) = Total Score: N/5
Focus on Risk Compliance, Math Expectation, and Rule-book Consistency

rule.condition: Narrative claim in report_human without corresponding TRUE slot in report_machine

failure_protocol.trigger: Any template deviation, illegal term, or symmetry failure detected
failure_protocol.action: Immediate halt -> Full rollback -> Re-generate based on Quantitative Data
